title: nothofagaceae
intro: Nothofagaceae is a family of flowering plants that belong to the Southern Hemisphere. It is a group of evergreen and deciduous trees and shrubs characterized by their broad, simple leaves and often winged seeds. The family Nothofagaceae is native to temperate regions, including southern South America, New Zealand, and southeastern Australia. The plants within this family are commonly known as Southern beeches, and they are often found in mountainous and coastal areas.
